scripts.compile: bun run ui:build && bun build --compile --minify --sourcemap --bytecode ./src/index.ts --outfile dist/server
scripts.ui:build: mkdir -p ./public/dashboard && bun build ./src/presentation/dashboard/client/index.tsx --outfile ./public/dashboard/client.js --target browser --format esm --minify && cp ./src/presentation/dashboard/styles.css ./public/dashboard/styles.css
scripts.test: bun test src/infra/storage/sqlite-store.test.ts src/infra/storage/sqlite-write-queue.test.ts src/infra/storage/storage-path.test.ts && bun test src/infra/auth/auth-dashboard.integration.test.ts src/transport/http/utils/response-headers.test.ts
